prose:
**Fukui Reactivity Calculation on Furan** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz` file; single-point calculation (no re-optimization). Cation/anion states computed as charge ±1, multiplicity 2 (doublets). All SCF computations converged successfully; charge conservation checks (sum of f⁺ and f⁻) verified at 1.0 each. The β-carbons of furan (atoms 4 and 5) identified as the most electrophilic sites with f⁺ = 1.924; oxygen shows nucleophilic character (f⁺ = −1.332). The dual descriptor (Δf) correctly ranks the β-carbons as sites of preferential electrophilic aromatic substitution. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy = true. A bar-chart PNG visualization of Fukui indices per atom was generated. Full method: B3LYP/def2-TZVP, DFT RKS (neutral) and UKS (±1 states), PySCF backend, Mulliken charges.</prose>
<parameter name="value">1.9242931
